title: Cryptool full platform redesign in progress
content_html:
Cryptool is going through a full platform redesign, driven by feedback from users on the current version.

The aim is a more intuitive, faster and more polished interface across every module. The rollout will take a few weeks to complete. Thanks for the patience while we get this right.

The user feedback that shaped this work has been incredibly useful, so please keep it coming.
author: Cryptool
